name: Asparagus Cheese Strata
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and drain the asparagus.
2. Remove crusts from bread slices and cut into cubes.
3. Arrange half of the bread in the bottom of a buttered 10 x 6 x 2-inch baking dish.
4. Cover bread with asparagus cut into pieces (canned pieces can be used instead).
5. Sprinkle shredded cheese over the asparagus.
6. Cover with remaining bread.
7. Beat eggs slightly and mix with milk, minced onion, seasonings, and melted butter.
8. Pour the egg mixture over the layered ingredients in the dish.
9. Let stand for 20 minutes.
10. Bake at 350 degrees for 45 to 50 minutes or until puffed and lightly browned.
11. Substitute broccoli pieces for asparagus if desired.
12. Serves 6.
